name: Jingle Bells Chocolate Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
Cover tray with wax paper. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place chocolate chips and 2/3 cup vanilla milk chips. Add 1 tablespoon shortening and stir.
Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 minute; stir. Microwave at HIGH an additional 1 to 2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds, until the chips are melted when stirred with a whisk. Stir vigorously until smooth.
Dip each pretzel into the chocolate mixture, tapping the fork on the side of the bowl to remove excess chocolate. Place coated pretzels on the prepared tray.
In a small microwave-safe bowl, place remaining 2/3 cup vanilla milk chips and remaining 1/2 teaspoon shortening. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 15 to 30 seconds or until melted when stirred with a whisk.
Using the tines of a fork, drizzle across the pretzels. Refrigerate until chocolate is set. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
WHITE DIPPED PRETZELS:
Prepare tray as directed above. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place 1-2/3 cups (10-oz. package) Hershey's Premier White Chips and 2 tablespoons shortening (do not use butter, margarine or oil). Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 2 minutes or until melted when stirred with a whisk.
Dip pretzels as directed above. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place 1/4 cup Hershey's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips and 1/4 teaspoon shortening (do not use butter, margarine or oil). Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 30 seconds to 1 minute or until melted when stirred.
Using the tines of a fork, drizzle across the pretzels. Refrigerate and store as directed above.
